title: BarShelf Registry Index v0.1
description: Schema for BarShelf registry index.json files. The registry is a curation layer on top of the widget publishing repo contract; each entry points to an installable widget source URL.

schemaVersion.description: Registry index schema version. Consumers must reject any value other than 1.

name.description: Human-readable registry name, e.g. "barshelf official registry".

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last index update.

id.description: Widget identifier. Must equal manifest.id of the installed widget.json; verified after install.

name.description: Display name shown in the gallery.

description.description: Short description shown in the gallery card.

icon.description: SF Symbol name for the gallery card.

category.description: Curated gallery category shown as a filter chip.

requires.description: Free-text external requirement shown as a gallery badge, e.g. "aas CLI" or "Deno runtime". Display-only; never an enforcement input.

screenshot.description: HTTP(S) or file URL of a gallery preview image. Display-only.

readme.description: Rendered Markdown introduction or documentation URL opened by the gallery Details action. Display-only.

collection.description: Optional gallery shelf grouping, such as custom.

accent.description: Gallery card accent name or #RRGGBB value.

url.description: Install source URL in the R05 URL-install contract format: GitHub repo URL (optionally /tree/{branch}/{subdir}), direct .zip/.mbw archive URL, or barshelf://install deep link string.

bundled.description: Optional directory name under the app bundle's Resources/widgets/. When present and available, the gallery installs by local copy before falling back to url.

permissionsSummary.description: Display-only permission summary for gallery trust UX. The actual gate is the post-install first-run approval card; this field never grants anything.

exec.description: Names of external commands the widget executes.

keychain.description: Whether the widget declares Keychain access.

notifications.description: Whether the widget declares notification permission.

network.description: HTTPS hosts the widget declares for network access.

readPaths.description: Local file roots the widget declares for read access.
